title: Cuneiform Tablet #0300: Old Babylonian Administrative
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a administrative document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a administrative document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Administrative document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records administrative matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
